documentary.description: Full 5-act biography or thematic documentary. Deep narrative, high clip + graphic density.

explainer.description: 3-act explainer. Graphics-heavy, fewer clips. Prioritises clarity over depth.

story.description: Narrative-led story. Clip-forward, fewer data graphics than documentary.

breakdown.description: Tactical or analytical breakdown. Graphics-dominant, clip density moderate.

news-style.description: Short-form news format. Low scene count, fast pace, minimal graphics.
